name: revit_copy_views_across_documents
description: Copies schedules and drafting views (with detailing) from one Revit document to another.

target_document_id.description: Element id or session identifier of the destination document

view_ids.description: Optional subset of schedule and drafting view ids to copy; omit to copy all eligible views

notes: DuplicateViewUtils contains the core logic. Replace the two-document-only guard with explicit document parameters.
